name: glaurung-a0-usbprint-policy-resource-frontier-v1
purpose: Measure a common deterministic reachable-function prefix across all five accepted scalar concretization policies after complete usbprint failed the v1 policy-resource boundary.
execution_order: point-major: all policies at prefix 5, then all policies at prefix 10, then all policies at prefix 15
stopping_rule: Stop at the first cell that is not a complete accepted high-confidence authority report. A four-run exact in-process deadline outcome is a resource-bound frontier observation; every other non-complete cell is a protocol failure.
axeyum_source_policy: Run from one clean detached commit containing this unchanged preregistration, runner, analyzer, measurement harness, and prior evidence.

driver.name: usbprint.sys
driver.role: unlabeled zero-high discovery and policy-resource population

min_unsigned_deadline_18.outcome: all four order-balanced authority processes hit the in-process wall-clock safety deadline

known_anchors.use: Historical anchors only. They are not rerun cells, do not change the new point boundaries, and do not establish behavior for maximum or either site-hash policy at 18.

policies.label: site-hash-1
policies.role: complementary deterministic site-stable mixed extremum schedule

points.label: prefix-5
points.selection_basis: one-third of the largest new prefix, fixed before observation

points.label: prefix-10
points.selection_basis: two-thirds of the largest new prefix, fixed before observation

points.label: prefix-15
points.selection_basis: the existing tcpip fixed-function boundary and five-sixths of prior AnyModel-complete usbprint, fixed before observation

acceptance.identity: Axeyum and Glaurung must remain tracked-clean and revision-stable; authority binaries, driver, registration, and every report hash must match exactly.
acceptance.complete_cell: Both authorities must complete two order-balanced repetitions at the exact analyzed-function limit with fixed-work-limit coverage, stable high-confidence output, exact high-confidence parity, policy telemetry, zero high-confidence usbprint rows, and complete work/cost telemetry.
acceptance.resource_cell: Only four exact 'analysis hit the wall-clock safety deadline' run errors with stable source identity count as a resource-bound observation.
acceptance.common_prefix: At least one complete point across all five policies is required. A pure resource stop after a complete lower point accepts a bounded frontier bracket; a complete 15-cell matrix accepts a common prefix of 15.
acceptance.raw_output: Raw and diagnostic populations are retained descriptively and are not recall or acceptance gates.

claim_limits: usbprint has zero independently validated positives and cannot establish recall, precision, or finding preservation.
Function-prefix completion measures Glaurung policy integration cost, not solver speed; no cross-backend timing ratio is a solver headline.
The 5/10/15 prefixes are deterministic nested work boundaries, not complete-driver coverage.
A resource-bound cell brackets the common policy frontier but does not count as zero findings or a solver disagreement.
The prior AnyModel-complete and minimum-deadline results at 18 remain historical anchors at an older corrected Glaurung revision and are not merged into the new matrix.
No result from this frontier admits symbolic memory, BoundarySet, DiverseEnum, or a new scalar default.
